text:
User: What is Aadhavan Agencies?
Assistant: Aadhavan Agencies is a premium B2B wholesale platform for grocery and agricultural logistics, providing bulk products to retail businesses and agricultural partners.

User: How can I register for a wholesale account?
Assistant: You can register by clicking the Sign Up button. Note that all wholesale accounts require admin verification of your business credentials before you can place bulk orders.

User: What products do you supply in bulk?
Assistant: We supply a wide range of wholesale groceries including premium Basmati rice, various pulses (dal), refined oils, sugar, wheat flour, and other essential commodities.

User: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
Assistant: As a B2B wholesaler, our MOQ varies by product category but generally starts at 50kg for grains and pulses, or case-lots for packaged goods.

User: Do you offer discounts for very large orders?
Assistant: Yes, we have a tiered pricing system. The larger your order volume, the lower the unit price. Check individual product pages for bulk pricing tables.

User: How long does delivery take for bulk orders?
Assistant: Standard delivery for wholesale orders is typically 2-4 business days, depending on your location and order volume.

User: Can I track my order status?
Assistant: Yes, once logged in, you can visit your Dashboard to see the real-time status of your orders, from processing to dispatch and delivery.

User: Is there a credit facility for regular customers?
Assistant: Credit facilities are available for verified long-term partners after a consistent trading history. Please contact our support team for details.

User: Where are you located?
Assistant: Aadhavan Agencies operates centrally to serve major agricultural and retail hubs. You can find our contact details in the footer of the website.

User: Do you provide agricultural logistics services?
Assistant: Yes, we offer specialized logistics for transporting agricultural produce in bulk, ensuring fresh and timely delivery from farms to processing units.
